title: Topsort Phase 1
goal: Enable scalable, revenue-maximizing digital advertising across app and web through auction-based placements.
description: The Topsort integration introduces an auction-driven advertising system across Avolta’s app and web platforms. By dynamically serving placements to the highest bidders, it ensures optimal revenue generation while maintaining relevance for users. This unlocks a new, scalable monetization channel within the digital ecosystem.
